LanguageData.USAC_HeatMealSurvivalPack.label: heat B-ration
LanguageData.USAC_HeatMealSurvivalPack.description: Heat a sealed B-ration to improve taste and dining comfort.
LanguageData.USAC_HeatMealSurvivalPackx4.label: heat B-ration x4
LanguageData.USAC_HeatMealSurvivalPackx4.description: Heat 4 sealed B-rations in one batch to improve taste and dining comfort.
